description: This file defines data transfer objects (DTOs) related to authentication requests in the backend of a Spring Boot application. It contains nested static classes for registration, login, verification re-sending, and link verification, annotated with Swagger/OpenAPI schemas.

classes.name: AuthRequests
classes.description: Container class for various authentication request DTOs

classes.name: ResendVerificationRequest
classes.description: DTO for requesting resend of email verification

classes.name: VerifyLinkRequest
classes.description: DTO for verifying email via token link
